shape_decode: cmp,vp,vpc,naive = L,_,W,_ : cmplog BLOCKS, value_profile_cmplog RESOLVES, value_profile & naive non-decisive. The only technique delta between the involved winner (vpc) and loser (cmplog) is value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient feedback (both already carry the IDENTICAL I2S substitution mutator). Layer-1 attribution is VP CMP_MAP gradient; this test is the INDEPENDENT real-data verification (G2) of HOW that gradient advantage manifests.
round0_refuted: Round-0 bet the whole shape on ONE story: VP's gradient closes scalar value-DISTANCE at the multi-byte gate operand (seed_set:value_distance_reached). The arbiter scored the inconclusive branches and NONE held. The scalar-distance-closure mechanism is empirically REFUTED for this shape and is NOT re-proposed (a relaxed-threshold re-test is forbidden).
round1_state: Round-1 added H1 vp_enriches_size_tag_bytes (operand_enrichment, whole-corpus target-vs-decoy byte-FREQUENCY at the fixed gate offset) and H2 vp_admits_size_tag_richer_corpus (joint_necessity analyze_pair, token/size lift). OUTCOME: H1 CONFIRMED exactly ONE branch -- libpng_4145 on sB. The other branches did not hold under H1/H2.
round2_state: Round-2 added H3 vp_corpus_drives_sanitize_loop_deeper (depth_reach, per-seed gate-line execution count via the cov image). OUTCOME: H3 CONFIRMED libxml2_9841 (loop-driven xmlns cascade re-entered deeper by the VPC corpus). H3 did NOT hold for harfbuzz_5474/5477, libxml2_6719, libxml2_8100 (depth_lift ~ 1 -- those gates are reached comparably often by both arms; the VPC advantage is not iteration-depth there). lcms_2090 was excluded from H3 (one-shot switch arm, no loop).
round3_state: Round-3 (FINAL). Confirmed branches FROZEN: libpng_4145 (H1), libxml2_9841 (H3). Five branches remain rule_not_met after H1/H2/H3: harfbuzz_5474, harfbuzz_5477, libxml2_6719, libxml2_8100, lcms_2090. The brief flagged three BUILT-but-untried tools: value_distance_reached (the round-0 REFUTED story -- not re-proposed), corpus_size_ratio (whole-corpus cmplog-vs-naive inflation/homogenization -- WRONG arm pair for an L_W_ shape whose delta is VPC-vs-cmplog and where vp is non-decisive; it does not measure the VP-gradient mechanism, so it is not a valid pivot here), and token_count (exact-literal PRESENCE in the curated resolving/blocking DB seed sets, offset-agnostic). token_count is the genuine novel pivot and applies cleanly to the 4-byte-literal harfbuzz pair. For the libxml2 pair (1-byte ':' / no literal) and the lcms switch arm it is non-discriminating, so those go honestly decidable:false (G3).

hypotheses.label: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient enriches the VPC-resolving corpus for the target literal bytes relative to decoy bytes at the gate offset: near-miss byte matches register as new coverage, so the gradient persistently steers the saved corpus toward the exact contiguous literal that bare I2S substitution does not persistently enrich. CONFIRMED on libpng_4145 (sB).
hypotheses.frozen_note: KEEP verbatim (G-superset). Already validated libpng_4145 on sB (signed_target_enrich 14.974 > decoy_enrich 12.639). Carried forward unchanged so that branch re-validates; NOT re-tested/relabelled/dropped. Members are the branches whose fixed-offset contiguous-literal gate operand_enrichment applies to; the arbiter confirms whichever the byte-enrichment signal holds for (so far: libpng_4145) and lets the rest fall through.

measurement.registry_tool_note: BUILT tool, descriptor_key corpus_queue:byte_freq_ratio:target_vs_decoy:per_gate_offset. Each server runs it on its own on-disk targets. Returns no_gate_signature for structural/switch gates (lcms_2090) -> not-scorable, handled by the arbiter.

operands_by_branch.libpng_4145: target = ICC-signature printable-ASCII range bytes; decoys = non-signature payload bytes (00,b1,8f,0b,fc). CONFIRMED.
operands_by_branch.lcms_2090: target = 'Lab '/'XYZ ' FOURCC tokens; decoys = 'mntr'/'RGB '/'MCHF'. (operand_enrichment may return no_gate_signature on the switch dispatch -> not scorable here.)
operands_by_branch.libxml2_6719: target = ':' (3a) + matched prefix bytes; decoys = '1' (31) version-string bytes.

hypotheses.prediction: signed_target_enrich > 0 AND signed_target_enrich > decoy_enrich: the VPC-resolving corpus is enriched for the target literal bytes relative to decoy bytes at the gate offset. DISCRIMINATING: cmplog carries the IDENTICAL I2S mutator, so a pure-I2S byte-substitution advantage leaves no persistently near-miss-enriched corpus (signed_target_enrich ~ 0); a clearly positive value is the signature uniquely attributable to VP's gradient-driven admission. RULED OUT: the refuted scalar-distance story AND the pure-I2S story.

hypotheses.label: corroborant: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient drives corpus admission toward seeds that physically CONTAIN the target structural token (and toward larger seeds carrying the feature record), because the gradient rewards partial assembly that edge-only feedback discards. A token-availability / structural-assembly advantage, orthogonal to scalar distance and to byte enrichment.
hypotheses.frozen_note: KEEP verbatim (G-superset). Carried forward unchanged. analyze_pair(winner=value_profile_cmplog, loser=cmplog) mode -- L_W_ has NO plain value_profile blocking seeds, so the 3-arm i2s_necessary/vp_tags mode is N/A; the discriminating contrast is the W=VPC-resolving vs L=cmplog-blocking pair.

measurement.registry_tool_note: BUILT tool, descriptor_key seed_set:struct_size_and_token_count:tokens:per_branch, analyze_pair mode. No code change.

hypotheses.prediction: tag_lift = winner_tags - loser_tags >= 1.0 OR size_lift = winner_size/loser_size >= 1.3: the VPC-resolving seed set carries at least one MORE target token than the cmplog-blocking set, and/or is >=30% larger. DISCRIMINATING vs the refuted scalar-distance story (whole-token PRESENCE / assembly EXTENT) AND vs a pure-I2S story (identical I2S mutator -> tag_lift ~ 0 AND size_lift ~ 1.0).

hypotheses.label: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient retains a corpus that drives the GATE LINE through MORE iterations / deeper into the loop per seed -- the VPC-resolving seeds re-enter the per-record sanitize / per-byte compare loop far more times than the cmplog-blocking seeds, so the branch line is EXECUTED more and the blocked side is actually TAKEN. An iteration-DEPTH / structural-traversal advantage measured by RUNNING the seeds through the cov image -- distinct from byte-enrichment (H1) and from token/size counting (H2). CONFIRMED on libxml2_9841 (xmlns equality cascade re-entered deeper by the VPC corpus).
hypotheses.frozen_note: KEEP verbatim (G-superset). Round-2 NEW; now FROZEN -- CONFIRMED libxml2_9841 on sB. Carried forward unchanged so that branch re-validates. The other listed members were scored under H3 and did not hold (depth_lift ~ 1); they fall through to H5 / decidable:false.

measurement.registry_tool_note: BUILT tool, descriptor_key seed_set:depth_reach:branch_line:per_branch. Run with --winner-fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --loser-fuzzer cmplog. Reads winner_line_count vs loser_line_count at the gate line from the llvm-cov dump after pushing the W/L seed sets through the cov image. Needs the target's libafl-<target>-cov image + >=1 W + >=1 L seed in DB; each server runs only its on-disk targets.

branch_line_by_branch.harfbuzz_5474: hb-ot-layout-common.hh:688 (FeatureParams::sanitize tag dispatch; per FeatureList record).
branch_line_by_branch.harfbuzz_5477: hb-ot-layout-common.hh:812 (OT::Feature::sanitize closure tag; per Feature record).
branch_line_by_branch.libxml2_9841: valid.c:4660 reached via the xmlns equality cascade (L1235/L1724). CONFIRMED.

params.note: single per-branch Docker run ~30-60s. lcms_2090 EXCLUDED -- one-shot switch arm, no iteration-depth signal.

hypotheses.prediction: depth_lift = winner_line_count / max(loser_line_count,1) >> 1 AND winner_deeper = true: the VPC-resolving corpus drives the gate line through many more executions per seed than the cmplog-blocking corpus. DISCRIMINATING: a pure-I2S (final-compare-only) alternative predicts depth_lift ~ 1.0 AND winner_deeper false; the static byte-enrichment / token-presence stories (H1/H2) are orthogonal and do NOT predict a per-seed execution-count lift. G2-INDEPENDENT: the line count is read off each arm's CORPUS cov dump, without reference to the resolve label.

hypotheses.label: NEW (round-3 pivot): value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient drives corpus ADMISSION toward seeds that already CARRY the exact 4-byte gate literal ('size', 73 69 7a 65) -- the gradient gives partial-credit coverage to near-miss tag bytes, so the VPC corpus accumulates and RETAINS members that contain a complete 'size' run, whereas the cmplog-blocking corpus carries only decoy table tags (GSUB/GPOS/GSHB) and never the literal. This is OFFSET-AGNOSTIC exact-literal PRESENCE in the curated resolving (winner) vs blocking (loser) seed sets, counted by scanning each whole seed -- genuinely distinct from H1 (operand_enrichment reads whole-corpus byte FREQUENCY at a FIXED gate offset, which fails when the tag floats to different offsets per seed), from H2 (joint_necessity structural-token + size lift), and from H3 (per-seed gate-line execution DEPTH). It directly explains why H1's fixed-offset enrichment failed on the harfbuzz pair while the literal is in fact present in the winner seeds: the 'size' run lands at varying offsets, invisible to a fixed-offset byte-frequency read but visible to a whole-seed literal scan.
hypotheses.novelty_note: G1-novel + genuinely-different mechanism + previously-untried BUILT tool (token_count, the brief's flagged pivot). The three refuted prior reads are: H1 whole-corpus byte-FREQUENCY at a FIXED offset; H2 structural-TOKEN/size lift over the seed set; H3 per-seed gate-line execution DEPTH. H5 reads exact-literal PRESENCE (mean b.count('size') per seed) over the curated resolving_seeds (winner) vs blocking_seeds (loser) DB sets, OFFSET-AGNOSTIC. A seed can carry the exact 'size' run at a non-fixed offset (so H1's fixed-offset enrichment misses it), with no extra structural tokens or size lift (H2 misses it), and reach the gate line no more often than the loser (H3 misses it) -- yet the literal is PRESENT in the winner set and ABSENT in the loser set. Presence and frequency/depth are orthogonal axes, which is exactly why presence can hold after all three failed.

measurement.registry_tool_note: BUILT tool bench/tools/token_count.py (descriptor seed_set:token_count:operand_literal:per_seed). Run: token_count.py branch --target harfbuzz --branch-id <5474|5477> --literal "'size'" --winner-fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --loser-fuzzer cmplog. It reads resolving_seeds (winner) + blocking_seeds (loser) from db/blockers.sqlite and counts mean occurrences of the exact literal per seed from on-disk queue bytes. No code change. On-disk corpus + >=1 readable W and L seed required (harfbuzz is on-disk on s4).

hypotheses.prediction: winner_literal_count >= 1.0 AND literal_presence_ratio < 0.5 (literal_presence_ratio = (loser_count+eps)/(winner_count+eps), so a value well below 1 means the exact 'size' run is present in the VPC-resolving seeds but DEPLETED in the cmplog-blocking seeds). DISCRIMINATING: a pure-I2S alternative (both arms have the IDENTICAL I2S substitution mutator) predicts comparable presence in both arms -> literal_presence_ratio ~ 1; a clear winner-only presence is the signature uniquely attributable to VP's gradient admitting+retaining the seeds that carry the assembled literal. ALSO RULED OUT: the refuted scalar-distance story (this is whole-literal PRESENCE, not residual Hamming distance) and H1's fixed-offset byte-frequency (offset-agnostic count holds even when the tag floats). G2-INDEPENDENT: counts seed bytes only, never the resolve label.

hypotheses.label: honest non-discriminable (G3): three branches whose VP-gradient mechanism no BUILT measurement can discriminate after H1/H2/H3 were all scored and none held. (1) lcms_2090 -- one-shot color-space SWITCH ARM (AddConversion line 458, Lab->XYZ PCS selection): operand_enrichment returns no_gate_signature on the switch dispatch, joint_necessity found no token/size lift, the scalar-distance story is refuted, and there is no loop for depth_reach; token_count is N/A (no fixed contiguous gate literal -- the discriminator is which FOURCC ARM, not literal presence). (2) libxml2_6719 -- the gate literal is the SINGLE byte ':' (0x3a), which is ubiquitous in every XML/text seed, so token_count's literal-presence count is chance-dominated (both arms carry many ':') and NOT discriminating; H1/H2/H3 already failed. (3) libxml2_8100 -- operand_kind none_structural / dispersed_multibyte DTD-lookahead, NO parseable contiguous gate literal at all, so token_count returns 'no parseable gate literal'; H1/H2/H3 already failed. For all three, no current corpus/seed/cov tool discriminates VP's mechanism on EITHER server. They carry the Layer-1 VP-gradient label but get NO independent confirmation; the arbiter correctly leaves them inconclusive (fallback). This is an honest no-clean-test outcome, NOT an off-server dodge -- the owning server (sB for all three) reaches the same undecidable verdict.
hypotheses.prediction: N/A -- no built measurement discriminates a single-shot FOURCC switch arm (lcms_2090), a single-byte ubiquitous ':' gate (libxml2_6719, chance-dominated presence), or a structural DTD-lookahead with no contiguous literal (libxml2_8100). The VP-gradient advantage at these gates is below the resolution of every current corpus/seed/cov tool (operand_enrichment, joint_necessity, depth_reach, token_count) on either server.
hypotheses.rule: decidable:false -> inconclusive (fallback). The owning server (sB) reaches the SAME undecidable verdict; do not chase a label here.

data_realities_respected: value_profile (CMP_MAP) is a FEEDBACK not a mutator -> NEVER measured via a seed_lineage 'gradient event'. Its effect is read off the corpus the gradient ADMITTED -- byte frequency (operand_enrichment), structural size+token count (joint_necessity), per-seed gate-line depth (depth_reach), and now exact-literal PRESENCE in the curated W/L seed sets (token_count). All four are corpus/seed-state computes, no lineage event.
I2S is NOT tagged in mutation_op -> NO seed_lineage:event_cooccurrence on an I2S event proposed.

token_count reads resolving_seeds (winner) + blocking_seeds (loser) bytes from the on-disk queue; harfbuzz is on-disk on s4 and its 286-rep branches have W/L seeds in db/blockers.sqlite. It scores only on-disk targets, consistent with the corpus-locality reality.

on-disk corpora exist ONLY for curl,harfbuzz,openthread,sqlite3 on s4 and lcms,libxml2,libpng,bloaty on sB -> the harfbuzz pair (H5) is seed-measurable on s4; the lcms/libxml2 branches are owned by sB. Cross-server: NO branch is marked decidable:false merely for absent corpus on the running server -- the decidable:false group is undecidable on its OWNING server (sB owns lcms/libxml2) for a mechanism reason (no fixed contiguous literal / single ubiquitous byte / one-shot switch), not a locality reason.

corpus_size_ratio was considered and REJECTED as a pivot: it is a whole-corpus cmplog-vs-naive (or naive_ctx-vs-naive) inflation/homogenization comparison, branch-independent and tied to the I2S/ctx corpus-hoarding families. For this L_W_ shape the technique delta is VPC-vs-cmplog and value_profile is a feedback (not an arm that inflates the saved-corpus count); corpus_size_ratio does not measure the VP-gradient admission mechanism, so it is not a valid discriminator here.
value_distance_reached was the round-0 REFUTED story (scalar Hamming-distance closure) and is NOT re-proposed -- a relaxed-threshold re-test is forbidden.
L_W_ has NO plain value_profile arm in the corpus (vp is non-decisive) -> joint_necessity is used in analyze_pair(VPC vs cmplog) mode.
notes:
PRIORS KEPT (superset/freeze, verbatim): H1 vp_enriches_size_tag_bytes (operand_enrichment) -- CONFIRMED libpng_4145 on sB; H2 vp_admits_size_tag_richer_corpus (joint_necessity analyze_pair); H3 vp_corpus_drives_sanitize_loop_deeper (depth_reach) -- CONFIRMED libxml2_9841 on sB. All three retained unchanged so the confirmed branches re-validate; no relaxed-threshold re-test.

NEW MECHANISM (round-3): H5 vp_admits_seeds_carrying_exact_size_literal, via the BUILT-but-untried token_count tool (descriptor seed_set:token_count:operand_literal:per_seed -- the brief's flagged pivot). It is a genuinely different mechanism from the three refuted reads: H1 = whole-corpus byte FREQUENCY at a FIXED offset; H2 = structural TOKEN/size lift; H3 = per-seed gate-line execution DEPTH; H5 = OFFSET-AGNOSTIC exact-literal PRESENCE (mean count of the exact 'size' run per seed) over the curated resolving vs blocking DB seed sets. It directly explains why H1 failed on the harfbuzz pair: the 4-byte 'size' tag floats to varying offsets per seed, invisible to a fixed-offset byte-frequency read but counted by a whole-seed literal scan. MEMBERS: harfbuzz_5474, harfbuzz_5477 (s4 on-disk, 4-byte contiguous 'size' literal). G1: predicts winner_literal_count >= 1 AND literal_presence_ratio < 0.5; the pure-I2S alternative (identical I2S mutator in both arms) predicts presence_ratio ~ 1. G2: counts seed bytes only, independent of the resolve label.

DECIDABLE:FALSE (G3, honest): H6 vp_advantage_no_built_discriminator_undecidable covers THREE branches for genuine mechanism reasons (not off-server dodges -- all three are owned by sB and undecidable THERE): lcms_2090 (one-shot FOURCC switch arm -- no fixed literal, no loop, operand_enrichment no_gate_signature); libxml2_6719 (single-byte ':' gate -- token_count presence is chance-dominated because ':' is ubiquitous in XML, so non-discriminating; H1/H2/H3 already failed); libxml2_8100 (none_structural DTD-lookahead -- no parseable contiguous gate literal at all, token_count returns no-literal; H1/H2/H3 already failed). After operand_enrichment, joint_necessity, depth_reach, and token_count, no built tool discriminates VP's mechanism for these three. An honest inconclusive is the correct outcome -- do not chase 100%.

NO NEW DESCRIPTOR NEEDED: all decidable hypotheses reuse BUILT registry tools by descriptor_key (operand_enrichment, joint_necessity, depth_reach, token_count). No code change.

EXPECTED OUTCOME: libpng_4145 re-validates under frozen H1; libxml2_9841 under frozen H3. The harfbuzz pair (same 'size' mechanism at two adjacent sanitize sites, identical seed sets) co-resolves under H5 if the VPC corpus carries the exact 'size' run that the cmplog corpus (GSUB/GPOS/GSHB decoys) lacks; if literal_presence_ratio ~ 1 there too, H5 is correctly refuted and they fall to inconclusive with the lcms/libxml2 trio. lcms_2090, libxml2_6719, libxml2_8100 stay honestly inconclusive (decidable:false).
